stages.summary: Apply transaction placed before its pre-apply gate.
Preview that incorrectly follows the apply transaction.

cleanupPolicy: Generated demo outputs stay untracked and git-ignored.
boundary: This demo proves a review-gated trusted source apply chain over one allowed low-risk source-like fixture; it is not unrestricted source mutation. There is no auto-apply and no self-approval: independent review required, and rollback and evidence required before any trusted write. Browser read-only or draft-only surfaces cannot apply patches or run commands.
